LanguageData.GR_CreateTemplateGenome.description: Create a template genome that can be used to duplicate existing genome samples.\n\nThis recipe needs corpses totalling 100 Kg of mass.
LanguageData.GR_CreateTemplateGenome.label: create template genome
LanguageData.GR_DuplicateAvianGenome.description: Duplicate the genome using a blank template.
LanguageData.GR_DuplicateAvianGenome.label: duplicate avian genome
LanguageData.GR_DuplicateBoomalopeGenome.description: Duplicate the genome using a blank template.
LanguageData.GR_DuplicateBoomalopeGenome.label: duplicate booma genome
LanguageData.GR_DuplicateCanineGenome.description: Duplicate the genome using a blank template.
LanguageData.GR_DuplicateCanineGenome.label: duplicate canine genome

LanguageData.GR_DuplicateEquineGenome.label: duplicate equine genome

LanguageData.GR_DuplicateFelineGenome.label: duplicate feline genome
LanguageData.GR_DuplicateHumanoidGenome.description: Duplicate the genome using a blank template.
LanguageData.GR_DuplicateHumanoidGenome.label: duplicate humanoid genome

LanguageData.GR_DuplicateInsectoidGenome.label: duplicate insectoid genome
